interfaces.name: getCategories
interfaces.description: Get all top-level product categories for navigation and homepage sections.

interfaces.name: getSubcategoriesForCategory
interfaces.description: Get subcategories within a given category for use in category pages and filters.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Fetch featured categories, products, services, packages, and articles for the homepage.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for a product listing page based on a category and optional subcategory.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products for a category or style with filters and sorting for product listing pages.

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a product detail page, including specs, shipping, and related products.

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the cart. Creates the cart internally if it does not exist.

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents and totals for the cart page and header mini-cart.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart line item and return the updated cart.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart line item and return the updated cart.

interfaces.name: getDesignServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get a list of active design services for the Design Services overview page.

interfaces.name: getDesignServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific design service to populate the booking page header.

interfaces.name: getAppointmentSlotsForDate
interfaces.description: Get available appointment slots for a service, appointment type, and date for use in the booking flow.

interfaces.name: bookServiceAppointment
interfaces.description: Book a design service appointment for a selected slot and collect user contact details.

interfaces.name: getDesignPackagesOverview
interfaces.description: Get a list of design packages for the Design Packages overview page.

interfaces.name: getDesignPackageDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details and configuration options for a specific design package.

interfaces.name: submitPackageQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request for a configured design package.

interfaces.name: getJournalArticles
interfaces.description: Search and list journal articles for the Journal / Blog listing page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query text, e.g., 'small apartment living room'

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content and metadata for an article detail page, plus related articles.

interfaces.name: saveArticleToFavorites
interfaces.description: Save an article to the user's favorites list from the article detail page.

interfaces.name: getFavoriteArticles
interfaces.description: Get the list of articles saved to favorites for the Account & Favorites page.

interfaces.name: removeFavoriteArticle
interfaces.description: Remove a saved article from the favorites list.

interfaces.name: getStyleQuizQuestions
interfaces.description: Get the active style quiz questions and their answer options for the Style Quiz page.

interfaces.name: submitStyleQuizAnswers
interfaces.description: Submit selected answer options for the style quiz and receive a recommended style.

interfaces.name: getCustomFurnitureOverviewContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Custom Furniture overview page, including example projects.

interfaces.name: getCurrentShelvingConfiguration
interfaces.description: Get the current working shelving configuration for the Shelving Planner page, or an empty default if none exists.

interfaces.name: setShelvingDimensions
interfaces.description: Set or update the wall width and height for the current shelving configuration.

interfaces.name: setShelvingFinish
interfaces.description: Set or update the finish (e.g., walnut) for the current shelving configuration.

interfaces.name: addShelvingModule
interfaces.description: Add a module (shelf, cabinet, drawer) to the current shelving configuration and recalculate price.

interfaces.name: removeShelvingModule
interfaces.description: Remove a module from the current shelving configuration and recalculate price.

interfaces.name: saveShelvingConfiguration
interfaces.description: Save the current shelving configuration to the user's saved designs.

interfaces.name: getSavedShelvingConfigurations
interfaces.description: Get all saved shelving configurations for display in Account & Favorites.

interfaces.name: renameSavedShelvingConfiguration
interfaces.description: Rename a previously saved shelving configuration.

interfaces.name: getAccountProfile
interfaces.description: Get the current account profile to prefill the Account & Favorites form, if it exists.

interfaces.name: createOrUpdateAccountProfile
interfaces.description: Create or update the single-user account profile from the Account & Favorites form.

interfaces.name: getAccountFavoritesOverview
interfaces.description: Get a combined view of favorited articles and saved shelving designs for the Account & Favorites page.

interfaces.name: getAboutStudioContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About Studio page including story, philosophy, team, and contact details.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the single-user cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, shipping, and total from cart items.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentDraftShelvingConfiguration
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the current shelving configuration in progress.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateShelvingTotalPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to sum module prices and compute the total price of a shelving configuration.

helperFunctions.name: _determineRecommendedStyleFromAnswers
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to derive a recommended style key from selected style quiz answer options.

helperFunctions.name: _getSingleAccountProfile
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the single-user AccountProfile record or create a placeholder if needed.
